description: Create a labeled computer vision dataset for Heart Rate OCR training using a Simulated Multiparameter Monitor device adapter in OpenICE Supervisor. Generate three data pairs in ~/Desktop/ocr_data/ consisting of cropped images (hr_sample_1.png, hr_sample_2.png, hr_sample_3.png) focused on the green Heart Rate (HR) number and label box, along with corresponding text files (hr_sample_1.txt, hr_sample_2.txt, hr_sample_3.txt) containing the visible integer value.
